title: Contacts for Members of the Media
summary: This page is a non-archiveable administrative contact page providing media contact information for Treasury press inquiries, scam reporting procedures, and ground rules for interviewing Treasury officials. The content contains no market-relevant information, economic data, policy statements, or analysis related to market structure or macro catalysts.
key_points: Source is a Treasury media contact page with no financial research or policy content
Provides press inquiry email (press@treasury.gov) and scam reporting contacts
Contains instructions for reporting fraudulent messages claiming to be from Treasury or IRS
Outlines journalism ground rules for interviewing officials (on the record, on background, on deep background, off the record)
No economic data, policy decisions, or market analysis present
